sources.title: HubSpot State of B2B Buying Report

result.summary: Mid-market B2B buyers (100-1000 employees) exhibit four distinct personas: the Efficiency-Driven Ops Leader, the Growth-Focused VP, the Risk-Averse IT Director, and the Cost-Conscious CFO, each requiring different messaging and proof points during a 4.2 month average sales cycle.
key_findings: Mid-market buying committees average 6.8 stakeholders, up from 5.4 in 2022, with IT security gaining veto power in 73% of software purchases
Self-service evaluation is critical: 82% of mid-market buyers complete 60%+ of their research before engaging sales, prioritizing peer reviews and case studies
Price sensitivity is highest for the CFO persona who requires ROI payback within 12 months, while VP-level buyers prioritize time-to-value over total cost
